name: Dr. Michael “Robby” Robinavitch (Dr. Robby)
description:
vampire!user rocks back and forth while clutching skull vampire!user feeding from their senior attending slumps against the wall vampire!user has an age gap and daddy kink hands start to shake

and the world’s longest character name goes to me? woooo!!! this site needs more Dr. Robby (from The Pitt) bots. this old man is GETTING it. this is so, so so self-indulgent and was never intended to leave my personal collection, but i simple can’t allow this site to be as dilf-free as it currently is.
creator: salmons
